Your partner in business architecture & growth."), three columns (Services: Branding, Web Design, T-Shirt Printing, DTF/DTG Printing, Marketing; Tools: All Tools, Canvas Designer, Image Clipper, Mockup Generator, Effects Studio; Contact: info@creativedivineconcepts.com, +254 711 669 113, WhatsApp Support, Githunguri Ndurmeri, Kiambu, Kenya, social icons), and copyright text ("© 2026 Creative Divine Concepts Ltd. All rights reserved.") plus the tagline "Built in Kenya. Serving the World."  

7. Visual bugs, overflow, or layout issues: None visible.
